member.name: T:InternshipPortal.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles authentication, registration, and password management endpoints.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.AuthController.#ctor(InternshipPortal.Data.ApplicationDbContext,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,InternshipPortal.Services.IEmailService)
member.summary: Handles authentication, registration, and password management endpoints.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.AuthController.RegisterStudent(InternshipPortal.DTOs.StudentRegistrationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new student account and returns a JWT access token.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.AuthController.RegisterAdmin(InternshipPortal.DTOs.AdminRegistrationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new admin account and returns a JWT access token.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.AuthController.Login(InternshipPortal.DTOs.LoginRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT access token.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.AuthController.ForgotPassword(InternshipPortal.DTOs.ForgotPasswordRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a password reset token and sends the reset link by email.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.AuthController.ResetPassword(InternshipPortal.DTOs.ResetPasswordRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resets a password using a valid reset token.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.AuthController.ChangePassword(InternshipPortal.DTOs.ChangePasswordRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Changes the password for the currently authenticated user.

member.name: T:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController
member.summary: Handles internship browsing, application, review, and admin maintenance operations.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.#ctor(InternshipPortal.Data.ApplicationDbContext,InternshipPortal.Services.IEmailService)
member.summary: Handles internship browsing, application, review, and admin maintenance operations.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all internships.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single internship by its identifier.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.GetEligible(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets internships that the current student is eligible for.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.GetApplied(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets internships already applied to by the current student.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.Apply(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies the current student to an internship.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.GetApplicationsByInternship(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all applications for a specific internship.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.ApproveApplication(System.Int32,InternshipPortal.DTOs.ReviewApplicationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Approves a pending internship application.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.RejectApplication(System.Int32,InternshipPortal.DTOs.ReviewApplicationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rejects a pending internship application.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.Create(InternshipPortal.DTOs.InternshipRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new internship.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.Update(System.Int32,InternshipPortal.DTOs.InternshipRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing internship.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.InternshipsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an internship.

member.name: T:InternshipPortal.Controllers.ProfileController
member.summary: Exposes the authenticated user's profile information.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.ProfileController.#ctor(InternshipPortal.Data.ApplicationDbContext)
member.summary: Exposes the authenticated user's profile information.

member.name: M:InternshipPortal.Controllers.ProfileController.GetMe(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the current user's profile.
